data.title: CIBC Innovation Banking Serves as Lead Arranger for Vena Solutions’ Expanded Credit Facility and Syndicate to Support Acquisition of Acterys
data.description: In Toronto, CIBC Innovation Banking revealed its participation as Lead Arranger and Administrative Agent in a larger credit facility for Vena Solutions. Vena, a prominent AI-driven Microsoft-native Financial Planning and Analysis platform, facilitates improved planning and outcomes by linking data, individuals, and agents. The enhanced financing and expanded syndicate will aid Vena in acquiring Acterys, a top Microsoft Power BI-based operator, underscoring the company’s growth and strategic initiatives.

data.title: Salesforce Bets On AI Agents With 'Headless 360' Debut Amid Software Stocks Sell-Off
data.description: Salesforce Inc. introduced Headless 360, moving towards an API-first architecture amidst a software sector downturn. This new platform allows AI agents and humans to carry out workflows across data, applications, and business logic. Headless 360 grants access to Salesforce's Customer 360 stack through APIs, MCP tools, and CLI commands, enabling AI agents to function without the need for traditional interfaces. The release features over 60 MCP tools and 30 preconfigured coding skills to provide agents direct entry into developer environments like Anthropic's Claude Code and Anysphere's Cursor. Additionally, a new Agent Fabric layer ensures governance and orchestration across multi-vendor AI deployments. As the software sector faces uncertainty, the discussion shifts between AI potentially enhancing SaaS offerings or posing a disruption risk. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: $10 Million For 30 Seconds? Disney's Super Bowl Pitch Faces Advertiser Revolt
data.description: Major media companies like the Walt Disney Company and the National Football League are exploring their pricing strategies and reshaping media rights deals amidst rising resistance from advertisers and the increasing presence of streaming platforms in live sports. Disney is requesting $10 million for a 30-second ad during Super Bowl LXI, but this high price point has deterred potential buyers as they are hesitant to meet this expectation. Unlike Fox Corp. and Comcast Corp.'s NBCUniversal, which typically secure 40% to 60% of ad inventory before upfronts, Disney has not reached similar levels of confirmed sales. They are also requiring marketers to spend across a wider range of their media assets, creating hurdles in negotiations. Disney is actively engaging in talks, reporting high demand but struggling to solidify deals. This information was reported on Friday by Variety. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Spirit Blockchain Capital Appoints Interim CEO and Interim CFO
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on April 17, 2026, Spirit Blockchain Capital Inc. (CSE: SPIR) revealed that Raymond O’Neill, the current Chairman and director, will now also take on the roles of Interim Chief Executive Officer, Interim Chief Financial Officer, and corporate secretary. This change comes as Lewis Bateman steps down from his positions as Chief Executive Officer, Interim Chief Financial Officer, and corporate secretary at Spirit.

data.title: Ally Financial reports first quarter 2026 financial results
data.description: Ally Financial Inc., based in Charlotte, North Carolina, announced its first-quarter results for 2026. The report, released on April 17, 2026, stated that Ally Financial Inc. (NYSE: ALLY) had a successful quarter. For more detailed information, interested parties can view the full press release in PDF format. All relevant documents, including the news release, presentation, and financial supplement, are available for access through the Ally Financial Press Room.

data.title: Suunto releases updates to navigation: new features for watches and offline routing in the Suunto app
data.description: In April 2026, Suunto will be launching a series of updates to enhance the mapping and navigation capabilities of its watches and app. These updates will introduce clearer maps, improved on-watch guidance, and enhanced climb information. Users can expect a more seamless navigation experience with these new features.

data.title: Class action lawsuit filed against Circle for failure to freeze $285M in stolen USDC during hack where hackers moved funds in 8 hours.
data.description: Attorneys claim that Circle did not freeze the stolen USDC in time when hackers transferred funds from the exploited trading platform during an eight-hour period.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For April 17, 2026
data.description: Several companies are set to release their quarterly earnings report before the bell today. Ally Financial is expected to announce earnings of $0.94 per share with revenue around $2.15 billion. Truist Financial is projected to report earnings of $1.00 per share with revenue of $5.17 billion. Fifth Third Bancorp is also expected to announce earnings, estimated at $0.47 per share, on revenue of $2.85 billion. Autoliv seems likely to report earnings of $1.80 per share with revenue of $2.61 billion. Stay updated for more details on these reports.

data.title: Energy Recovery to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Energy Recovery, Inc. (NASDAQ: ERII) based in San Leandro, California, is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company's earnings release is scheduled for Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the market closes. A live conference call to discuss the results and other related matters will be held on the same day at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET. For those interested, the listen-only conference call can be accessed by dialing +1 (877) 709-8150 within the US and Canada.

data.title: MasTec plans Q1 2026 earnings conference call.
data.description: In a recent report on the economy, it was stated that the country's GDP grew by 3.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations of 2.7%. The unemployment rate has fallen to 4.1%, the lowest in the past five years. Additionally, the stock market has surged by 8% in the past month, with the benchmark index reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Experts predict continued growth in the coming months, citing increased consumer spending and business investments as key driving factors.

data.title: SunCoke Energy, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Date
data.description: SunCoke Energy, Inc. (NYSE: SXC) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026, before the New York Stock Exchange opens for trading. The company will conduct its quarterly earnings call at 11:00 am ET on the same day. For those interested, the conference call will be available for live streaming at a dedicated web address and will be accessible for replay in the Investors section of the SunCoke Energy website. Investors and analysts are encouraged to participate in the event.
